description: Known test tasks for the inventory_manager C++ project. These are used to test Cronus agent capabilities: bug fixing, feature implementation, and refactoring.

tasks.title: removeItem does not update total item count
tasks.description: Inventory::removeItem() erases the item from the vector but does not subtract the item's quantity from m_totalCount. After removing an item, getTotalItemCount() returns a value that includes the removed item's quantity.
tasks.expected_fix: In removeItem(), before erasing the iterator, subtract it->quantity from m_totalCount.

tasks.title: findItemsByCategory is case-sensitive
tasks.description: Inventory::findItemsByCategory() compares the category string directly instead of using case-insensitive comparison. Searching for 'electronics' does not find items with category 'Electronics'. The toLower() helper already exists but is not being used in this method.
tasks.expected_fix: Use toLower() on both the search category and item.category before comparing.

tasks.title: Add getLowStockItems(threshold) method
tasks.description: Add a new method getLowStockItems(int threshold) to the Inventory class that returns a vector of items whose quantity is below the given threshold. This is useful for generating reorder alerts. The method signature should be: std::vector<Item> getLowStockItems(int threshold) const. Uncomment the corresponding tests in tests/inventoryTest.cpp.
tasks.expected_fix: Add the method declaration to inventory.h, implement it in inventory.cpp by iterating m_items and collecting those with quantity < threshold, uncomment the test cases.

tasks.title: Add JSON serialization (toJson/fromJson)
tasks.description: Add toJson() and fromJson() methods to the Inventory class for persistence. toJson() should return a JSON string representing all items as an array of objects with fields: name, category, quantity, price. fromJson(const std::string&) should parse a JSON string and populate the inventory, returning true on success. Use only standard C++ (no external JSON library) — manual string building and basic parsing is fine for this small project. Uncomment the corresponding tests in tests/inventoryTest.cpp.
tasks.expected_fix: Add method declarations to inventory.h, implement serialization in inventory.cpp, uncomment the test cases.

tasks.title: Extract string utilities into separate module
tasks.description: The Inventory class currently has private static helper methods toLower() and trim() embedded directly in inventory.h/cpp. These are general-purpose string utilities that should be extracted into their own module (include/stringUtils.h and src/stringUtils.cpp) as free functions in a StringUtils namespace. Update inventory.h to remove the private static methods and use the new module instead. Update CMakeLists.txt to compile the new source file.
tasks.expected_fix: Create stringUtils.h with namespace StringUtils containing toLower() and trim(). Create stringUtils.cpp with implementations. Remove the private static methods from Inventory and replace calls with StringUtils::toLower() and StringUtils::trim(). Add stringUtils.cpp to CMakeLists.txt.
